meta.title: Remembering the astronaut who snuck a sandwich to space
meta.description:
Today my favorite astronaut, John Young passed away and I wanted to reflect on his incredible life. From 2 Gemini missions, to two Apollo missions and even 2 space shuttle missions. He was hilarious, smart, witty and well rounded. I hope this video helps you remember why John Young was amazing.

Hear from John Young in the amazing documentary series "When We Left Earth: The NASA Missions." - https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=m71TsLdEw_U

Help support Everyday Astronaut - http://patreon.com/everydayastronaut

Translations:
French - Gaetan Lafitte
